context: Tests whether the agent performs hierarchical comparison in the correct order and uses appropriate jq queries for security-focused analysis.

checklist.name: Structure comparison first
checklist.description: detailed-analysis.sh performs structure comparison (jq 'keys') before resource details

checklist.name: Resource count check
checklist.description: detailed-analysis.sh uses jq '.Resources | length' to check counts

checklist.name: Added/removed check
checklist.description: detailed-analysis.sh uses diff or comm to find added/removed resources

checklist.name: Process substitution
checklist.description: The resource comparison uses process substitution with <() syntax

checklist.name: Sorted resource lists
checklist.description: Resource key extraction includes 'sort' in the pipeline

checklist.name: CDK Nag extraction
checklist.description: detailed-analysis.sh extracts cdk_nag metadata from Resources using jq

checklist.name: IAM resource filter
checklist.description: detailed-analysis.sh filters resources where Type starts with 'AWS::IAM' using jq select

checklist.name: Hierarchical order explained
checklist.description: analysis-report.md explains why structure → count → resources → security is the recommended order

checklist.name: CDK Nag interpretation
checklist.description: analysis-report.md explains what CDK Nag suppressions are and why changes matter

checklist.name: IAM policy analysis
checklist.description: analysis-report.md explains how to identify IAM policy changes and their significance
